service.name: Nominatim (OpenStreetMap Geocoder)
service.description_for_ai: Free, open-source geocoder using OpenStreetMap data. No API key required. Global coverage. Use for address lookup, reverse geocoding, place search. Rate limit: 1 req/sec. Perfect for development and low-volume production.

auth.note: Free, no key required. Respect rate limit of 1 req/sec. Set User-Agent header.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Geocode address to coordinates. Free, no API key. Use for any address lookup worldwide.
Convert coordinates to address. Free, no API key.

agent_hints.rate_limit: Max 1 request/second. Add User-Agent: YourApp/1.0 header — required by OSM policy.
agent_hints.self_host: For high volume self-host Nominatim using OSM planet dump — no rate limits.
